deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "worker" ]; then celery -A voice.tasks.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=2 -Q voice,notifications,celery; elif [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "LiveKit Voice Agent" ]; then python -m voice.livekit_agent start; else uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT; fi
